title: Chapter 14
content:
Chapter 14: Chapter 14: New MILF

He truly lived a good life... in a MILF world where he could slowly do the deed with those busty MILFs!

’Heck... let’s stop daydreaming and look the reality in front.’ Owen managed to pull his thoughts back down from flying above the cloud nine.

"System... can you give me information about Affection?" He was curious to know a very important piece of information... he needed to know what kind of struggle he had to put in to get those plump, squishy ass cheeks in his hands.

Ding!

[Affection Levels]

Note: Making progress might take a long time if you don’t take bold actions.

[

Strangers

:The Host and the MILF do not have the slightest contact with each other...]

[Acquaintances

: The Host and the MILF know each other and have had a slight conversation... Both parties need to recognize each other to reach this level.]

[Friends

: The Host and the MILF have a good relationship and share a solid connection with each other.]

[Special Interest:

The MILF is slightly attracted to the Host, creating a small spark of affection... a small deed can easily bridge the gap to the next level.]

[Love

: The MILF has completely fallen for the Host, freely expressing her love to him! Proceeding to the delightful deed is fully possible; just ask her, and she will spread her legs to show her fruit!]

[

Soul Bond

: The soul and physical body of the MILF are completely connected to the Host. The MILF can no longer live without seeing the Host for a single day.]

[Special Affection]

[

Family

: The MILF thinks of you as a family member... it will instantly jump to the Love level once you completely manage to fill the 100/100 points.]

Owen read through the information in front of him... the Family tier was a big surprise.

It was a truly unique kind of affection, making it a very special sub-type.

It only applied to MILFs to whom he was actually related in this world, just like Arielle being his mother... aunties and other close relatives would likely work this way, too, making it very special.

"There’s no time to dwell, let’s take matters forward..." Owen wanted to head out into the village.

He wanted to see the layout of the place, the village wonders that can offer... it was a completely different experience when you were actually living it, compared to just playing a game.

As for lending a hand to Arielle... he didn’t need to overthink it; she would come out once she finished doing her deed in the restroom.

Owen slowly walked over and opened the front door, instantly met with a rush of fresh air...air that was of vastly higher quality than the air back on Earth, especially compared to the shitty city environment where he used to live.

’Aahh... fresh air, not bad, hehe I’m truly living in different world now.’ Owen inhaled deeply, thoroughly enjoying the quality.

Combined with the perfect warmth of the sunlight, it was absolutely top notch...a city boy can’t experience the luxury of being free from the noise and never ending tide of problems.

A daily basis and a long lasting problem. Truly a shitty world that a person lived in.

Owen didn’t hesitate and slowly walked outside... then he turned his body around to take a proper look at their house.

’As expected... it’s exactly the same,’ Owen thought as he observed the wooden house with its simple yet elegant look.

Greenery filled the yard with plants, flowers, and bushes, forming a simple, elegant garden... just enough to provide a wonderfully aesthetic vibe.

After taking everything in, he began to walk... though as for his actual destination, his mind was still a blank slate.

He wanted to explore without a proper plan to make things more exciting.

....

’Wow... this place truly embraces a simple life.’ Owen looked at the simple houses erected along the path.

They were almost identical to his own home, but as far as he could tell, the surroundings were completely silent.

There wasn’t a single soul to be seen... it was a truly tranquil place, a total heaven compared to the bustling, loud noise of crowds, vehicles, and advertisements in the city.

He slowly walked until he finally arrived to the bench...a perfect bench as the view in front is the golden rice fields, it’s grain flowed as the gentle breeze of the air pressed against each stalks..

And the wild expensanse of plains as far as he could see...while tall mountains, filled with tall trees that’s bare visible because of the distance.

It’s truly a fantasy world that any man would dreamed of...

"Never in my wildest dreams I see this beautiful scenery." Owen mumbled while looking the scenery, it’s definitely one of those social media thingy where those famous individuals would take some videos with some editing and perfectly fit music...

"Fufu...it’s truly beautiful scenery..." A women voice echoed in his ears forcing Owen to turned his head.

What he saw was a another busty MILF standing, she wore a normal farming clothes with a straw hat, her hair is long casscading almost reaching her back but it’s color is gold...

There no need to mention her face...

(I’m already tired man...all I can say is that, all of them are ethereal beauties.)

Owen gulped hard as he looked the huge enormous melons that’s clearly making it’s way...it’s about to burst out her buttons.

Owen recalled the anime back then...the living heaven of that buttons, trying to hold it’s dear string!

’Uhh what anime it was?...oh right! It’s "Prison University".’ he recalled that underrated ecchi funny anime.

It’s truly one of the best one... though it’s heartbreaking as it only got few episodes!

Ding!

He stopped his daydreaming as he heard the usual chimed of the system..

Name: Morenne

Age: 35 years old

Level of Affection: Special Interest- 23/100

Current Feeling: Curious

[Note: Morenne is curious that the son of her long, long best friend is back to the village.]
